records.summary: Governed entry point for Thiruppugazh, Kavasam works, Arunagirinathar literature, prayer records, reading formats and rights-aware audio status.
Unified, searchable gateway to verified devotional modules, directories, learning, personal browser-local tools and operational-quality records.
Transparent Phase D and E view of canonical routes, release-showcase pages, placeholders, duplicate-name candidates and unresolved-link remediation.
Collection-by-collection publication coverage for original Tamil, easy-reading Tamil, transliteration, meaning, audio rights and source verification.

limitations: An addition is appended only when its path is not already present in the historical route registry.
Route existence does not imply complete devotional text, verified translation or recording rights.
No historical route record is deleted or overwritten by this file.
